news_angle: Bitcoin ETF inflows in US dollars tracked by Farside Investors highlight notable market interest in 2023.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a slick port captain cat at a busy shipping dock labeled 'Bitcoin ETF Flows', directing a chaotic fleet of tiny crypto-coin cargo ships unloading glowing USD crates. Around him a bustling harbor scene shows other animals rushing to load and unload, some slipping on scattered coins, with a scoreboard-style tide gauge showing rising inflows in millions. Hunk Mao wears a captain's hat and sunglasses, confidently grinning while holding a chart scroll with ascending arrows. In the background, subtle details like a London Eye silhouette and small boats marked 'Farside Investors' add locale context.
image_prompt: Create a vibrant, dynamic square illustration featuring Hunk Mao as a charismatic orange tabby cat port captain with sharp tabby markings and a mischievous grin, dressed in a captain's hat and sunglasses. He stands on a pier bustling with activity as small animated crypto-coin shaped cargo ships unload glowing crates labeled with USD signs symbolizing Bitcoin ETF flows. The scene includes a stylized scoreboard tide gauge displaying rising ETF inflows in US$m. Background elements include a London Eye silhouette and small boats marked 'Farside Investors', with playful streetwear-style animals and comic slips on scattered coins. The scene should have three visual planes: engaging foreground with Hunk Mao directing, midground of busy port operations, and background cityscape. Add many tiny easter eggs such as subtle Bitcoin logos in water droplets, mice dressed as traders, scattered tiny newspaper headlines referencing ETFs, and glowing orange trails from coins. Include one clear readable phrase 'BITCOIN $ FLOW' in bold block letters on a dockside sign. The style is colorful, youthful, and energetic, capturing Hunk Mao’s cool internet-native personality and lively dynamic poses.
easter_eggs: Tiny mice wearing trader glasses and holding miniature briefcases labeled 'ETF'.
Bitcoin logos hidden in water splashes and dock wood grain.
Small floating crates labeled with different crypto symbols (ETH, LTC) for subtle contrast.
Playful rats slipping on scattered golden coins near the docks.
A seagull wearing a tiny chain necklace with a Bitcoin pendant.
Mini newspaper stands with headlines like 'Crypto Wave' and 'ETF Surge'.
Glowing orange trails behind coin-shaped cargo ships.
Subtle shadow of a London Eye behind the harbor.
Tiny digital screen on the captain’s chart showing an upward arrow.
A coin-shaped life preserver with a Hunk Mao paw print emblem.
caption: Bitcoin ETF inflows tracked by Farside Investors show millions flowing into the market this year. I’m just here making sure these crypto ships don’t crash into each other — smooth sailing only, people!
risk_notes: No investment advice given. Illustration uses metaphorical representation of ETF flows without reflecting individual investment outcomes.
